case_title: KIMBERLY BROWN VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO-SFMTA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED JAN-19-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO-SFMTA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, KIMBERLY UNHOUSED, CURRENTLY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REMARK: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION SENT TO KIMBERLY BROWN RETURNED-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BROWN, KIMBERLY UNHOUSED, CURRENTLY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO-SFMTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO-SFMTA
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIMS AGENT. ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF STATE PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND MS. GREEN CONFIMED, BUT WITHOUT THE PLAINTIFF THE COURT MUST DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
